scope: apps/api/src/auth/auth-http.ts pseudo-header filtering and URL host fallback
docs/execution-plan.md and docs/testability-status.md public-safe status updates
deterministic collector signals retry-without-backoff-or-timeout and shared-state-without-lock-signal
residualRisk: Approved with risk: the independent security reviewer verified both deterministic collector signals as false positives. retry-without-backoff-or-timeout points at synchronous URL string construction, not retry or polling behavior. shared-state-without-lock-signal points at request-local Headers construction, not cross-request shared mutable state. The reviewer initially found one real coverage gap around :authority host fallback; the test was hardened to capture the Web Request sent to auth.handler and the targeted re-review returned no findings. Remaining protocol/test string literals are intentional HTTP boundary fixtures and are not blocking for this PR.
